components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563EB; color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 700; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #1E40AF; }

components.name: Dashboard Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1.5px solid #B0C4DF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12); }

narrative.overview: The Hauers design system is built to evoke the authority and precision of a high-stakes academic testing environment.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The primary blue accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

dos: Do maintain a strict 4px grid rhythm
Do ensure every card has a visible 1.5px border
donts: Don't use glassmorphism or background blurs
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as a colored accent
